subcodes.first_line: O Kamál! Two supreme bounties have been vouchsafed unto thee: first, that in the year Nine thou wert blessed with attainment unto the presence of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کمال بدو فضل بزرگ فائز شدی اول آنکه در سنه تسع بلقاء الله مرزوق گشتی و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness
